mapper.select: SELECT s.*, t.team_name, w.work_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id, ct.track_name FROM submission s LEFT JOIN team t ON s.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id WHERE s.submitter_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.submission_time DESC

SELECT s.*, t.team_name, w.work_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id, ct.track_name FROM submission s LEFT JOIN team t ON s.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id WHERE s.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY s.submission_time DESC

SELECT s.*, t.team_name, w.work_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id, ct.track_name FROM submission s LEFT JOIN team t ON s.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id WHERE w.track_id = #{competitionTrackId} ORDER BY s.submission_time DESC

SELECT s.*, t.team_name, w.work_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id, ct.track_name FROM submission s LEFT JOIN team t ON s.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id WHERE w.competition_id = #{competitionId} ORDER BY s.submission_time DESC

SELECT s.*, t.team_name, w.work_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id, ct.track_name FROM submission s LEFT JOIN team t ON s.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id ORDER BY s.submission_time DESC
